entries.open_risk: Simulations.Crumble native algorithm is not ported. NativePreview returns identity height and zero debris. No node wrapper, no register_node! call, no Bridge/native raw buffer matrix, and no devflywheeltool command exist. The Direction gradient pre/post logic (add gradient before simulation, subtract after) is in the decompiled Crumble.Build() but not in the Rust substrate. Next step: port Simulations.Crumble from the Gaea native binary (likely a thermal-style particle simulation), add a first-class devflywheeltool probe command, then scaffold the node wrapper.
